part.text: I’ll inspect the target file around the patched function and confirm the include context before applying the minimal equivalent hunk.

state.output: Failed to find ctags. Install Universal Ctags and make sure ctags.exe is on PATH, or install it with `winget install --id UniversalCtags.Ctags`.

part.text: The target implementation is the same CPU kernel but uses synchronous `OP_REQUIRES` in `Compute`, not the newer async helper. I’m adding the same input length guard at the equivalent shape-validation point.

input.patch:
diff --git a/tensorflow/core/kernels/sparse_fill_empty_rows_op.cc b/tensorflow/core/kernels/sparse_fill_empty_rows_op.cc
--- a/tensorflow/core/kernels/sparse_fill_empty_rows_op.cc
+++ b/tensorflow/core/kernels/sparse_fill_empty_rows_op.cc
@@ -55,6 +55,11 @@ class SparseFillEmptyRowsOp : public OpKernel {
     OP_REQUIRES(context, TensorShapeUtils::IsVector(values_t.shape()),
                 errors::InvalidArgument("values must be a vector, saw: ",
                                         values_t.shape().DebugString()));
+    OP_REQUIRES(context, indices_t.dim_size(0) == values_t.dim_size(0),
+                errors::InvalidArgument(
+                    "The length of `values` (", values_t.dim_size(0),
+                    ") must match the first dimension of `indices` (",
+                    indices_t.dim_size(0), ")."));
     OP_REQUIRES(context, TensorShapeUtils::IsScalar(default_value_t.shape()),
                 errors::InvalidArgument("default_value must be a scalar, saw: ",
                                         default_value_t.shape().DebugString()));

    index 5b8bff38f3..806d092104 100644

         OP_REQUIRES(context, TensorShapeUtils::IsVector(values_t.shape()),
                     errors::InvalidArgument("values must be a vector, saw: ",
                                             values_t.shape().DebugString()));
    +    OP_REQUIRES(context, indices_t.dim_size(0) == values_t.dim_size(0),
    +                errors::InvalidArgument(
    +                    "The length of `values` (", values_t.dim_size(0),
    +                    ") must match the first dimension of `indices` (",
    +                    indices_t.dim_size(0), ")."));
         OP_REQUIRES(context, TensorShapeUtils::IsScalar(default_value_t.shape()),
                     errors::InvalidArgument("default_value must be a scalar, saw: ",
                                             default_value_t.shape().DebugString()));
  notes: >
    Added the missing SparseFillEmptyRows validation that values length matches indices first dimension, adapted to the target synchronous OP_REQUIRES kernel.
